Agropyron cristatum, commonly known as crested wheatgrass, is a perennial bunchgrass native to Europe and Asia. The health benefits of Agropyron cristatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system due to its antioxidant and prebiotic properties. The bioactive constituents of Agropyron cristatum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
